# Visualizer

This sub-package maintains [`Plots`](plots.md#pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlot) and [`Plotters`](plotters.md#pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlotter). A [`Plot`](plots.md#pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlot) needs to be assigned a [`Plotter`](plotters.md#pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlotter) for it to be visualized.
